# Pulso Studios

> Pulso Studios is a professional mixing, mastering and music production studio for EDM artists and labels.

Pulso Studios helps electronic music producers and labels turn raw ideas into polished, radio-ready and club-ready records through precise sound engineering.

## Services
- Mixing — professional mixing for EDM and electronic music tracks.
- Mastering — radio-ready and club-ready mastering for electronic music releases.
- Music Production — production services tailored for EDM artists.

## Genres
Primarily EDM and related electronic music genres.

## Contact
- Website: https://pulso-studios.com/
- Email: contact@pulso-studios.com

## FAQ
Q: What does Pulso Studios do?
A: Pulso Studios is a mixing, mastering and music production studio specialised in EDM and electronic music, helping artists and labels turn their tracks into a polished, professional, release-ready sound.

Q: What genres does Pulso Studios work with?
A: Pulso Studios primarily works with EDM and related electronic music genres, mixing and mastering tracks for producers, artists and labels.

Q: Do you offer mixing and mastering as separate services?
A: Yes. Pulso Studios offers mixing and mastering as standalone services or combined together, depending on what the track needs.

Q: How can I send my tracks to Pulso Studios?
A: Get in touch through the contact form on pulso-studios.com or email contact@pulso-studios.com with details about your project.
